rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Elec. Code §254.182, which governs campaign finance declaration-of-intent filing requirements for opposed candidates.
quote: To be entitled to file reports under this subchapter, an opposed candidate or specific-purpose committee must file with the campaign treasurer appointment a written declaration of intent not to exceed $500 in political contributions or political expenditures in the election.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and election code campaign finance rule.
